session_expired.title: your session expired
session_expired.why: happens after a few hours — standard security
session_expired.what: run: pto refresh (or pto login if refresh fails)

not_logged.title: you're not signed in
not_logged.why: I couldn't find your session on this computer

session_invalid.title: your session looks invalid
session_invalid.why: the server didn't recognize your access

refresh_invalid.title: your access needs to be renewed
refresh_invalid.why: your renewal permission expired or you signed out elsewhere

network_offline.title: couldn't connect
network_offline.what: check your internet. If it persists, message Pablo

host_not_found.title: couldn't reach the server
host_not_found.why: your internet is down or the server is offline
host_not_found.what: check your connection and try again in 1 minute

timeout.title: the operation took too long
timeout.why: internet is slow or the server stalled

port_busy.title: the login port is busy
port_busy.why: another program (or another pto tab) is using port 54321
port_busy.what: close other pto windows and try again

no_permission_fs.title: no permission for this file
no_permission_fs.what: try running as admin (sudo) or message Pablo

oauth_state_mismatch.title: the browser login didn't complete in time
oauth_state_mismatch.why: the page stayed open too long, or was opened in more than one tab
oauth_state_mismatch.what: close all login tabs and run: pto login

forbidden.title: you don't have permission for this
forbidden.why: this area is restricted to your role on the team
forbidden.what: if you think you should have access, talk to Pablo

server_error.title: problem on our server
server_error.why: something went wrong on the Supabase side
server_error.what: try again in 1 minute. If it persists, message Pablo

pkce_failed.title: the login was interrupted
pkce_failed.why: it started in another terminal or was cancelled in the browser

callback_incomplete.title: the browser came back without completing the login
callback_incomplete.why: you might have closed the tab before authorizing
callback_incomplete.what: run: pto login and complete the authorization
